Name: A Light Weight Multi-Distance fNIRS Dataset for Ball-Squeezing Task and Purposeful Motion Artifact Creation Task
Acknowledgements: This work was supported by the NIH BRAIN Initiative (Grant No. 1U01EB029856-01). We thank all the participants and research staff involved in the data collection and analysis.
HowToAcknowledge: Gao, Y., Rogers, D., von Lühmann, A., Ortega-Martinez, A., Boas, D.A., & Yücel, M.A. (2023). Short-separation regression incorporated diffuse optical tomography image reconstruction modeling for high-density functional near-infrared spectroscopy. Neurophotonics, 10(2), 025007. https://doi.org/10.1117/1.NPh.10.2.025007
EthicsApprovals: the Institutional Review Board of Boston University (Protocol #4502)

Paradigm.Description: emained mentally idle avoiding any head movement
Ball squeezing task for both hands
Six instructed movements: tilting head (right/left/up/down), raising eyebrows, and saying 'hello'
